name: Tackle
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A basic full-body charge into the target.

name: Scratch
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Sharp claws raked across the target.

name: Pound
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Strikes the target with a long tail or limb.

name: Quick Attack
move_effect: Target takes damage. Has Priority.
move_description: A strike performed with blinding speed — acts before most other moves.

name: Hyper Beam
move_effect: You cannot act on your next turn after using this move.
move_description: A powerful beam of energy that requires rest to recharge.

name: Body Slam
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Paralyzed.
move_description: A full-body drop that can paralyze targets.

name: Hyper Voice
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A powerful sound wave blasted at all enemies in range.

name: Double Slap
move_effect: Make up to 3 separate Accuracy Checks dealing 2d4 on each hit.
move_description: Rapidly slaps the target multiple times.

name: Growl
move_effect: Target has -1 Attack until end of their next turn.
move_description: A cute sound that lowers the target's fighting spirit.

name: Tail Whip
move_effect: Target has -1 Defense until end of their next turn.
move_description: A friendly tail wag that leaves the target off guard.

name: Leer
move_effect: Target has -1 Defense until end of their next turn.
move_description: A sharp intimidating glare that lowers the target's guard.

name: Sing
move_effect: Targets are Asleep.
move_description: A soothing melody that puts nearby foes to sleep.

name: Yawn
move_effect: Target falls Asleep at the end of their next turn.
move_description: A contagious yawn that makes the target drowsy.

name: Harden
move_effect: Your Defense is +2 until your next turn.
move_description: The user stiffens its body to raise its Defense.

name: Protect
move_effect: Until your next turn all attacks targeting you automatically miss.
move_description: Creates a barrier that blocks all incoming attacks for one turn.

name: Swift
move_effect: Swift cannot miss.
move_description: Star-shaped rays that never miss the target.

name: Pay Day
move_effect: Scatter up to 3 attacks. Coins are scattered after each use.
move_description: Hurls coins at the target — scatter up to 3 separate attacks.

name: Fake Out
move_effect: Has Priority. Target is Stunned. Can only be used on the first round of combat.
move_description: A startling move that only works at the very start of a fight.

name: Metronome
move_effect: Roll 1d6 and use the corresponding move from any move list.
move_description: Waggles a finger unpredictably to call a random move.

name: Ember
move_effect: On hit if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Burned.
move_description: Small flames launched at the target — may cause a burn.

name: Flamethrower
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Burned.
move_description: A powerful stream of fire — high chance of Burning on a strong hit.

name: Fire Blast
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: An enormous pillar of fire that scorches everything in its path.

name: Flare Blitz
move_effect: You take 1d12 recoil damage.
move_description: A full-speed charge wrapped in flames — deals heavy recoil.

name: Lava Plume
move_effect: On hit if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Burned.
move_description: A burst of volcanic heat that may Burn all nearby targets.

name: Fire Fang
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Burned.
move_description: A biting attack with blazing fangs — may cause a Burn.

name: Thunderbolt
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Paralyzed.
move_description: A reliable jolt of electricity with a solid chance of Paralysis.

name: Thunder
move_effect: Has -2 on Accuracy Check unless it is Raining. On hit if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check the targets are Paralyzed.
move_description: A massive thunderbolt — hard to aim but devastating in Rain.

name: Shock Wave
move_effect: You cannot miss targets with less than 15 Special Defense.
move_description: A fast electric strike that cannot miss weaker targets.

name: Volt Tackle
move_effect: You take 1d10 recoil damage.
move_description: A high-speed charge crackling with electricity — heavy recoil.

name: Thunder Wave
move_effect: Target is Paralyzed.
move_description: A weak jolt of electricity that reliably Paralyzes the target.

name: Water Gun
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A jet of water shot at the target.

name: Hydro Pump
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A violent torrent of water blasted at the target.

name: Water Pulse
move_effect: On hit if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Confused.
move_description: Rings of water that may confuse the target on a strong hit.

name: Aqua Ring
move_effect: You recover 1d8 HP at the start of each of your turns for 5 rounds.
move_description: Wraps the user in a veil of water that slowly restores HP.

name: Bubble
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Bursts bubbles at all nearby targets.

name: Razor Leaf
move_effect: On hit if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Stunned.
move_description: Sharp leaves launched with high critical-hit potential.

name: Leech Seed
move_effect: Target is seeded for 5 rounds. A seeded target loses 1d6 HP at the start of each of their turns and you regain that much HP.
move_description: Plants a seed on the target that drains HP each round.

name: Petal Dance
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A spinning dance scattering petals at the target.

name: Solar Beam
move_effect: Solar Beam is a two-turn move. On the first turn aim. On the second turn fire for 5d12 damage.
move_description: Absorbs sunlight for a turn then blasts it as a massive beam.

name: Sleep Powder
move_effect: Targets are Asleep.
move_description: Scatters a cloud of sleep-inducing powder over nearby targets.

name: Poison Powder
move_effect: Target is Poisoned.
move_description: Releases a toxic dust that Poisons the target.

name: Sludge Bomb
move_effect: On hit if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Poisoned.
move_description: Hurls a glob of toxic sludge — may Poison on a solid hit.

name: Karate Chop
move_effect: Deals an extra 2d8 damage on a Critical Hit.
move_description: A precise chop with high critical-hit potential.

name: Low Kick
move_effect: Deals more damage to heavier targets. For each weight category above Light add 1d8 damage.
move_description: A tripping kick that deals more damage the heavier the target.

name: Dynamic Punch
move_effect: The target is Confused.
move_description: A brutal punch that always Confuses the target on a hit.

name: Cross Chop
move_effect: Deals an extra 3d10 on a Critical Hit.
move_description: A powerful two-armed chop with high critical-hit potential.

name: Submission
move_effect: You take 1d8 recoil damage.
move_description: A grappling move that deals recoil damage to the user.

name: Bullet Punch
move_effect: Has Priority.
move_description: A punching move with metallic fists that strikes first.

name: Iron Tail
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A strike with a tail hardened like iron.

name: Heavy Slam
move_effect: Deals more damage to lighter targets. For each weight category below Superweight the target is add 1d12 damage.
move_description: A body-weight crash — more devastating against lighter targets.

name: Sand Attack
move_effect: Target has -2 on all Accuracy Checks until end of their next turn.
move_description: Flings sand into the target's eyes to reduce their accuracy.

name: Earthquake
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A powerful tremor that shakes everything in range.

name: Shadow Ball
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target has -1 Special Defense.
move_description: A ball of negative energy that may lower the target's Sp. Def.

name: Dream Eater
move_effect: Dream Eater can only target Asleep targets. You regain HP equal to half the damage dealt.
move_description: Feeds on the dreams of a sleeping target — restores the user's HP.

name: Hypnosis
move_effect: Target is Asleep.
move_description: Projects a hypnotic gaze that puts the target to sleep.

name: Psychic
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target has -1 Special Defense.
move_description: A telekinetic attack that may weaken the target's Sp. Def.

name: Psybeam
move_effect: On hit if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Confused.
move_description: A beam of psychic energy that may Confuse the target.

name: Psystrike
move_effect: Psystrike targets the opponent's Defense instead of their Special Defense.
move_description: Uses psychic power to strike the target's physical defenses.

name: Ancient Power
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A primordial power said to contain the energy of ancient ages.

name: Power Gem
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Fires a beam of gems that strikes with radiant energy.

name: Gust
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Stirs up a gust of wind to strike the target.

name: Air Slash
move_effect: Has -1 during Accuracy Check. On hit if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Stunned.
move_description: Blades of compressed air — difficult to aim but may Stun on a solid hit.

name: Silver Wind
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A powdery silver wind launched from the wings.

name: String Shot
move_effect: Target's Speed is -2 until end of their next turn.
move_description: Shoots sticky thread that slows down the target.

name: Pin Missile
move_effect: Make up to 5 separate Accuracy Checks dealing 1d8 on each hit.
move_description: Sharp pins launched in rapid succession.

name: Night Slash
move_effect: On hit if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check deal an extra 2d8 damage.
move_description: Strikes with exceptional critical-hit potential in the dark.

name: Bite
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A snapping bite — reliable and straightforward.

name: Dark Pulse
move_effect: On hit if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Stunned.
move_description: A wave of dark energy that may Stun the target.

name: Dragon Claw
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Slashes the target with sharp draconic claws.

name: Dragon Rage
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A blast of draconic power.

name: Outrage
move_effect: Outrage is a two-turn move. On each turn move to the closest character within 25 ft and roll Accuracy Check and damage. After your second turn you are Confused.
move_description: A rampage of draconic fury that Confuses the user afterward.

name: Slash
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A slicing attack with sharp claws or a cutting appendage.

name: Rapid Spin
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: Spins rapidly to strike and remove hazards.

name: Acid Armor
move_effect: Your Defense is +3 until end of combat.
move_description: Dissolves the user's body into liquid to sharply boost Defense.

name: Agility
move_effect: Your Speed is +4 until end of combat.
move_description: Clears the user's mind to sharply boost Speed.

name: Aura Sphere
move_effect: Aura Sphere cannot miss.
move_description: A ball of pure fighting energy that never misses.

name: Ice Beam
move_effect: On hit if you got 15 or higher on Accuracy Check the target is Frozen.
move_description: A freezing beam — may Freeze the target on a strong hit.

name: Transform
move_effect: You transform into the target copying all of their stats moves and types for 5 rounds.
move_description: Transforms the user into a copy of the target.

name: Thrash
move_effect: Thrash is a two-turn move. On each turn move to the closest character within 25 ft and roll Accuracy Check and damage. After your second turn you are Confused.
move_description: A violent rampaging attack that Confuses the user afterward.

name: Hurricane
move_effect: Has -2 during Accuracy Check unless it is Raining. On hit if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check the targets are Confused.
move_description: A massive twisting storm — hard to aim but Confuses targets in Rain.

name: Volt Absorb
move_effect: Passive: When you are hit by an Electric-type attack halve the damage then you regain that much HP instead.
move_description: Absorbs incoming electric attacks to restore HP.

name: Recover
move_effect: Restore HP equal to half your max HP.
move_description: Restores up to half the user's maximum HP.

name: Extreme Speed
move_effect: Has high Priority.
move_description: A full-speed tackle that almost always moves first.

name: Skull Bash
move_effect: Target takes damage.
move_description: A powerful headbutt launched after charging up.

name: Land's Wrath
move_effect: Legendary move.
move_description: Commands the land itself to strike down the target.

name: Thousand Waves
move_effect: On hit all targets are bound to the ground for 10 mins. Ignores Ground-type immunities.
move_description: A wave of earth that binds targets to the ground — ignores immunity.

name: Core Enforcer
move_effect: If any targets acted before you this turn they lose all ability passives for 10 mins.
move_description: Seals away the abilities of targets who have already moved.
